hero.thesis: Launch an AI voice agent service that handles after-hours calls for dental offices, streamlining appointment bookings and reducing missed calls.
hero.marketSize: With over 200,000 dental offices in the US, the potential market for AI voice agents is substantial, especially given the increasing adoption of AI in healthcare.
hero.payingEvidence: Practices are already paying $300-$500 monthly for answering services, indicating a willingness to pay for effective, automated solutions.

ninetyDay.title: Foundation Setup

actions.action: Register your LLC using Stripe Atlas.
Set up a website with Webflow to capture leads.
actions.success: Website live with a contact form.

actions.action: Define core features and develop a basic prototype using Framer.

ninetyDay.metric: LLC registered, website live, prototype demo-ready.

actions.action: Identify 50 potential dental offices in your area using Google Maps and dental association directories.
Join dental industry forums and Reddit communities like r/dentistry to understand common pain points.
actions.success: Key pain points and questions documented.

actions.action: Craft a unique selling proposition (USP) based on research insights.
actions.success: Clear USP that addresses market needs.

actions.action: Create a cold email template using Apollo for outreach.
Join dental office management Facebook groups to learn more about office operations.
actions.success: Engaged with at least 2 new groups.

actions.action: Launch email campaign to the 50 identified offices.

ninetyDay.title: Initial Customer Acquisition

actions.action: Follow up with leads who responded positively, offering a free one-month trial.
Set up trial accounts and integrate with their existing systems.
actions.success: 3 trial accounts set up and running.

actions.action: Monitor performance and gather feedback from trial users.

ninetyDay.metric: 3 trial accounts active, initial feedback received.

actions.action: Analyze feedback and identify areas for improvement in the product.
Implement high-impact changes in Framer.
Communicate changes and improvements to trial users.
Conduct a second round of outreach to 50 new dental offices.
Enhance AI capabilities with new voice scripts using Lovable.
Activate feedback loop with trial users using Notion for structured feedback gathering.
Convert 2 trial users into paying clients with a $299/month plan.
Optimize the website for SEO to attract organic leads.
Leverage LinkedIn to connect with office managers and owners in your target area.

ninetyDay.title: Scaling Outreach

actions.action: Develop a referral program offering a discount for client referrals.
Use Make to automate follow-up emails with non-respondents.
Launch targeted ads on Facebook to reach more dental offices.

ninetyDay.metric: Referral program live, ad campaign launched.

actions.action: Integrate Calendly for seamless appointment bookings.
Test system performance and make necessary adjustments in response to client feedback.
Create a client onboarding guide.
Schedule regular check-in calls with current clients using Cal.com.
Host a webinar on optimizing dental office operations using your AI agent.
Collect testimonials and case studies from satisfied clients.
Review operational processes and identify automation opportunities.
Implement identified process automations using n8n.
Update pricing plans based on feature expansions and client feedback.

ninetyDay.title: Finalizing the Launch Phase

actions.action: Confirm renewals with existing clients and finalize new contracts.
actions.success: Contracts renewed and new contracts signed.

actions.action: Develop a quarterly review plan for clients to ensure ongoing satisfaction.
Celebrate your successful launch and plan next steps for growth.

ninetyDay.metric: Contracts renewed, growth plan in place.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: For creating a professional website to capture leads and showcase your service.

toolStack.name: Framer
toolStack.why: To build and iterate on your AI voice agent prototype quickly.
toolStack.pricing: Free for basic plan, $15/month for advanced features.

toolStack.name: Apollo
toolStack.why: To streamline your cold email outreach and manage sales leads.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, $39/month for advanced features.

toolStack.name: Lovable
toolStack.why: To enhance AI voice capabilities with engaging scripts.

toolStack.name: Make
toolStack.why: To automate follow-up emails and streamline repetitive tasks.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, $9/month for additional automations.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, $8/month for premium features.

toolStack.name: Cal.com
toolStack.why: To schedule and manage client check-in calls efficiently.
toolStack.pricing: Free for individuals, $12/month for additional features.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: To manage project tasks and collect structured feedback.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, $8/month for team collaboration.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Subject: Simplify Your After-Hours Calls for [Dental Office Name]

Hi [Name],

I'm [Your Name], founder of [Your AI Voice Agent Brand]. We specialize in handling after-hours calls for dental offices like [Office Name], ensuring you never miss an opportunity to book an appointment.

I’d love to offer you a free trial of our service. It's easy to set up and can drastically reduce missed calls and improve bookings.

Can we schedule a quick call to discuss how we can help [Office Name]?

Looking forward to your reply.

Best,

[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial email, follow-up in 3 days, another follow-up in 7 days, then a call in 10 days if no response.

pricing.starter: $299/month for small practices with up to 3 dentists.
pricing.raisingRules: Increase prices by 10% annually or with significant feature enhancements.

failureModes: Ignoring feedback loop: Not iterating based on client feedback can stall growth.
Overengineering: Building unnecessary features that don't address core pain points.
Pricing mismatch: Setting prices too low or too high, missing the target customer base.
Poor outreach strategy: Ineffective initial communication can lead to low conversion rates.
Neglecting customer support: Poor support can lead to high churn rates.
Ignoring competition: Not staying aware of competitors' offerings can lead to obsolescence.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to streamline LLC registration and get an EIN.
setup.payments: Integrate Stripe for seamless subscription billing and payment processing.
setup.contracts: Draft service contracts using standard templates from Rocket Lawyer.
setup.insurance: Consider professional liability insurance through Hiscox to cover potential risks.

scaling: Once you reach $5,000 MRR, consider hiring a part-time sales associate to expand your outreach efforts. Use commission-based incentives to motivate them. Additionally, bring on a part-time developer to handle ongoing product improvements and customer support tasks. This allows you to focus on strategic growth and client relationship management. Implement a CRM system like HubSpot to manage and analyze customer interactions, improving customer satisfaction and retention. As you scale, explore partnerships with dental supply companies or software providers to cross-sell and expand your client base.
